ai_tips: Starting out at 5m — 4.64km ahead with 3m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔5米出发——全程4.64公里，累计爬升3米。
0.39km in — pace 4:33/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.39公里——配速4:33/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 2.47km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 1m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到2.47公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅1米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 6m at 0.41km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点6米，位于0.41公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -4.3% at 3.87km — you kept it controlled at 9:22/km, protecting the legs. 全天最陡的下坡：3.87公里处坡度-4.3%——你稳健控制在9:22/公里，保护了腿部。
4.07km — late-run check: pace 26:53/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 4.07公里——后程检查：配速26:53/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 4.64km in 26:39 (avg 5:44/km, +3m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成4.64公里，用时26:39（平均配速5:44/公里，爬升3米）。全程稳定扎实。
